channel.title: BUpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats threaten to derail Senate business until Republicans hold public hearings on Iran war
item.description: At least a half-dozen Senate Democrats are threatening to force repetitive votes on war powers resolutions and use other tools of the minority party t...

item.title: Iran war follows decades of the theocratic regime's deadly global terrorism
item.description: Before the U.S. and Israel opened a war on Iran, the Islamic republic had waged a nearly 50-year campaign of global terrorism that has killed thousand...

item.title: Trump vows that Iran war will be 'short-term'
item.description: President Trump told Republican House members Monday that the war in the Middle East will be only a "short-term excursion."

item.title: Senate leaders resist Trump pressure on talking filibuster, SAVE America Act
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune said Monday that he hopes President Trump will change his mind about not signing bills into law until the SAVE Ameri...

item.title: Trump says other nations have Tomahawk missiles after strike hits school, kills more than 160 people
item.description: President Trump on Monday said other countries might have been responsible for firing a Tomahawk missile that hit an Iranian school on the first day o...

item.title: Trump Keeps Gambling With the Economy — And Getting Away With It
item.description: President Donald Trump has taken one risk after another that could have destabilized the American economy. Iran is the latest crisis to test U.S. econ...

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: CNN Wonders Why ICE Is Targeting Charlotte, N.C. Here’s Why.
item.description: ICE targets Charlotte, North Carolina due to the city’s mounting immigration problem. It is also the seat of Mecklenburg County which permits the sher...

item.title: Deterring Illegal Immigration: This Town Decided that Actions Speak Louder than Words
item.description: After approving an anti-sanctuary resolution, Worthington Hills, Kentucky is not a sanctuary for illegal aliens. To read the rest of the article click...

item.title: Chicago Mayor Dodges Question by Quibbling Over Term “Illegal Alien”
item.description: Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson is happy to spend hundreds of millions of taxpayer dollars on benefits and services for illegal aliens. What he does not...

item.title: Gavin Newsom: What’s Three Lives and Another $200 Million Anyway?
item.description: In just the last two months, illegal aliens operating big rigs with California commercial driver’s licenses have cost six innocent motorists their liv...

item.title: DHS Launches Operation River Wall to Secure Rio Grande Valley
item.description: DHS’s Operation River Wall will surge U.S. Coast Guard assets to waterways at our southern border to target illegal immigration, transnational crimina...

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
